name: Configure Autocomplete in Shopify Editor
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure autocomplete search functionality directly within the Shopify editor, customizing how search suggestions appear and behave without editing code. This visual configuration approach makes it easy to optimize the autocomplete experience to match your merchandising priorities and customer search patterns."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Configuring autocomplete through the Shopify editor enables you to adjust suggestion types, layouts, and product displays to create an optimized search experience. By using visual tools to control which content appears in autocomplete dropdowns, you can help customers find products faster, which tends to improve search engagement and can lead to higher conversion rates from search interactions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This guide explains how to configure and customize the "}, {"text": "Autocomplete", "bold": true}, {"text": " feature using Shopify's editor with our Liquid integration. It covers the following:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Templates for Autocomplete."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Adding content to Autocomplete."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Adding more than two content widgets."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "1. Autocomplete Templates", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We provide two main templates for Autocomplete:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Default (Vertical)", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Displays results in a vertical layout."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Horizontal", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Displays results in a horizontal layout."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure the templates in the "}, {"text": "Shopify Editor", "bold": true}, {"text": " as shown below."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Selecting a Template"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to the "}, {"text": "Autocomplete Settings", "bold": Adding More Than Two Content Widgets", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To include more than two content widgets, you need to configure them manually in the "}, {"text": "findify-head-injector.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": " file."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Steps:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Open the "}, {"text": "findify-head-injector.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": " file."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Add the additional content widgets in the "}, {"text": "window.findify.extraContents", "code": true}, {"text": " object using the following format:"}]}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "extraContents:  {
